fixture.name: sample-board.fixture.json
fixture.purpose: Non-production viewer QA data for card rendering and layout checks.
fixture.safeUse: Load through viewer.html with the Load JSON file control. Do not copy this file over board.json.

todo.title: Populate a long To Do card with dependency and scope metadata
todo.summary: This sample card intentionally contains a longer summary so QA can verify line wrapping, card height, expanded detail sections, and collapsed task behavior without relying on the real coordination board.
requirements: Show a To Do task with long copy that wraps across multiple lines.
Expose related task metadata, dependency metadata, files, and inspection targets in one card.
Keep the ID in the SAMPLE-QA namespace so accidental API mutation attempts do not match live tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: The To Do lane displays the title, priority, project, summary, and metadata without clipping.
Expanded details show long requirements and acceptance criteria in readable spacing.
The card can be collapsed and expanded without shifting unrelated lane controls unexpectedly.

inspectionTargets.label: Expanded To Do card
inspectionTargets.state: Load this fixture and expand SAMPLE-QA-001.
inspectionTargets.notes: Check long text wrapping, metadata chips, and file list rendering.

todo.notes: Sample notes: this card is intentionally verbose to exercise wrapping and detail density. It is not real project work.

todo.title: Show a blocked dependent To Do card
todo.summary: Blocked sample task used to verify dependency and blocker display.
requirements: Display blocker text without overlapping metadata chips.
acceptanceCriteria: Dependency and blocker sections are readable in the expanded card.
Redo count and normal priority remain visible.

inspectionTargets.label: Blocked card metadata
inspectionTargets.notes: Confirm blockers and dependencies are legible.

blockers: Waiting on SAMPLE-QA-001 in this fixture to exercise blocked-task rendering.

claimed.title: Show a claimed worker card with agent ownership
claimed.summary: Claimed fixture task for validating active work highlighting, ownership fields, and safe visual differentiation from unclaimed To Do cards.
requirements: Keep action buttons visually reachable while preserving the fixture as non-production data.
acceptanceCriteria: Claimed styling is visually distinct from regular To Do cards.
ClaimedBy and claimedAt details are readable in the expanded card.

inspectionTargets.label: Claimed card state
inspectionTargets.state: Load fixture and inspect the To Do lane with claimed cards shown above todo cards.
inspectionTargets.notes: Confirm claimed ownership and column grouping are clear.

review.title: Show a Review card with inspection targets
review.summary: Review fixture task used to check reviewer-facing card presentation and the inspection target list.
requirements: Render a task waiting for review.
Show multiple inspection targets with path, viewport, state, and notes.
acceptanceCriteria: Review lane displays the card ahead of Done.
Inspection targets are scannable in the expanded card.

inspectionTargets.label: Fixture file load
inspectionTargets.state: Use Load JSON file and select the fixture.
inspectionTargets.notes: Confirm To Do, Review, Done, and Archived sample data render.

inspectionTargets.label: Mobile review card
inspectionTargets.state: Load fixture and expand this review card.
inspectionTargets.notes: Check wrapping and tap target spacing.

review.notes: Sample worker completion note: fixture data created and ready for review.

reviewing.title: Show an actively reviewing card with feedback draft
reviewing.summary: Reviewing fixture task for checking active reviewer ownership and feedback controls.
requirements: Show existing review notes and source review metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: Reviewing styling is distinct from waiting Review cards.
Review controls remain visually understandable without forcing live board mutation.

inspectionTargets.label: Reviewing card state
inspectionTargets.state: Load fixture and inspect the Review lane.
inspectionTargets.notes: Confirm reviewClaimedBy and reviewClaimedAt are visible.

reviewing.reviewNotes: Sample draft feedback: verify visible focus before approving.

done.title: Show an approved Done card with review notes
done.summary: Approved sample task for validating Done lane card presentation, approval metadata, and archive affordances.
requirements: Render an accepted task in Done.
Show reviewer decision metadata and review notes.
acceptanceCriteria: Done card can be expanded and collapsed.

inspectionTargets.label: Done lane card
inspectionTargets.notes: Confirm approval metadata and archive button layout.

done.reviewNotes: Sample approved review note: fixture card renders as expected.

done.title: Show a replaced Done card with owner feedback
done.summary: Closed sample task with failure metadata and owner feedback so QA can verify denser Done cards.
requirements: Render failure expected, actual, and decision fields.
Render owner feedback entries without layout collisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Failure brief and owner feedback are readable.

inspectionTargets.label: Dense Done card
inspectionTargets.notes: Check failure metadata, feedback text, and compact card spacing.

done.reviewNotes: Sample rejected review note: follow-up card should cover the remaining issue.
done.failureExpected: Fixture card should fit long review feedback.
done.failureActual: Original sample text overflowed a compact card in the mock scenario.
done.failureDecision: Closed as replaced by SAMPLE-QA-002 for fixture coverage.

ownerFeedback.feedback: Sample owner feedback entry used to verify returned-review context rendering.

archived.title: Show an archived card in the archive tray
archived.summary: Archived fixture task for validating the archive tray count, open state, close button, and archived-card rendering.
requirements: Render the archive side tab with a nonzero count.
Render an archived card when the tray is opened.
acceptanceCriteria: Archived card text and metadata are readable.

inspectionTargets.label: Archive tray
inspectionTargets.state: Load fixture, open the Archived tab, and expand SAMPLE-QA-008.
inspectionTargets.notes: Confirm tray position, count, close behavior, and archived-card layout.

archived.reviewNotes: Sample archived task approved before archive.
